channel.title: Create a carousel news component like the image
channel.description:
![carousel|690x298](upload://rJXljxl1MXwK0RgaK5BhCDUkN4i.jpeg)
How to create a carousel news with thumbnails like the image

item.title: Create a carousel news component like the image
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @elytcha,

Welcome to the community!

Working in a Frontity project is no different than working on any other isomorphic React project with the same challenges and very often with the same solutions provided by the React community

With a quick look on Google you’ll find some React componentes to create carrousels:

  • https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-responsive-carousel
  • https://www.npmjs.com/package/pure-react-carousel

We encourage you to start your project and share here in the community forum any specific issue you may find when trying to develop this feature with Frontity.

In order to provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible please provide the info suggested here when you ask your technical question about your Frontity project

The more info you provide about your issue the better. Providing a repo or code-sandbox with your code is especially helpful to find solutions of technical issues with specific code

Read full topic
item.source: Create a carousel news component like the image
